Disposable Pint (20oz) and Half Pint (10oz) A great addition to your Pub, Bar, kiosk, concession stand, fast food restaurant, or to-go establishment, you can't go wrong with this Choice plastic cup! Its simple design makes it perfect for a variety of beverages so you can stock your shelves and never be without this convenient, disposable cup. A strong yet flexible plastic beer glass is exactly what you need for your party supplies. Completely BPA Free and Recyclable These plastic pint cups can be used without worry of breakage and injury. Durable Construction Made with durable plastic, this cup is crack-resistant so you can confidently serve lemonade, Beer, fountain drinks, smoothies, and more! Sturdy and Durable Plastic These plastic pint and half pint glasses are made from high quality food grade plastic and will not crack or break. Excellent Product Visibility The crystal-clear plastic construction gives this disposable drinkware an upscale appearance & helps boost impulse sales for all of beverages. User Friendly Without the hassle and worry of cracked sidewalls, you can minimize customer complaints by providing durable drinkware for an enjoyable experience. Clear Plastic Heavy Duty Cups Our lightweight sturdy design allows for easy product separation, Nicely rolled full rim for easy sipping. Clear colour glasses are required, explore pint and half pint glasses made of crystal clear PET material. High in quality, all glasses can be recycled for commercial use. These glasses offer unparalleled strength because they are made from tough polypropylene plastic. Slightly flexible, glasses offer a premium feel.
